title: Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary is situated in Tarabganj Tehsil about 40 km from Gonda District and about 45 km from Gonda city at Mankapur-Nawabganj Road and Mankapur-Faizabad Railway
overview.description: Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary is situated in Tarabganj Tehsil about 40 km from Gonda District and about 45 km from Gonda city at Mankapur-Nawabganj Road and Mankapur-Faizabad Railway Line in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. The lake is naturally able to sustain resident birds throughout the year and migratory birds during winter season.

topPlaces.name: Nawabganj, Gonda
topPlaces.description: Nawabganj is a city and a Nagar Palika Parishad in Gonda district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is under Ayodhya Development Authority (ADA) and is divided into 25 wards for which elections are held every 5 years.

topPlaces.name: Nandini Nagar Mahavidyalaya
topPlaces.description: Nandini Nagar Mahavidyalaya (NNM) is located at Nawabganj, in Gonda district of Uttar Pradesh. The college is affiliated to Maa Pateswari University, previously, it was affiliated to Dr.

items.note: Nawabganj is a city and a Nagar Palika Parishad in Gonda district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is under Ayodhya Development Authority (ADA) and is divided into 25 wards for which elections are held every 5 years.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow (127 km) and the nearest railway station is Lucknow Charbagh (123 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Parvati Arga Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nawabganj, Gonda, Nandini Nagar Mahavidyalaya.
